channel.title: Bollinger Bands on Judy AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Bollinger Bands on Judy AI Lab

item.title: The Single Strategy Trap: Why You Need a Multi-Strategy Trading System
item.description: A single strategy can't adapt to all market conditions - trend strategies get worn down in ranging markets, and mean reversion strategies get crushed in trending markets. This article teaches you how to use ADX to detect market regimes, automatically switch strategy combinations, and boost trading confidence and win rate through multi-strategy confirmation.
